prompt: a 90s website thats about the game half-life
remarks: must have half-life icon, looks like its made by html-1, those shadowy button
prompt_refined: A nostalgic 1990s-era website homepage dedicated to the game Half-Life. The design features a low-resolution, pixelated aesthetic with a web-safe color palette. A prominent header displays the Half-Life title or logo. A vertical navigation menu is on the left side, with options like 'News', 'Screenshots', and 'Downloads'. The main content area contains small, blocky images or low-fidelity screenshots from the game, alongside simple text. Include typical 90s web elements such as a hit counter, animated GIFs, or a 'Best viewed with' badge.
objects: Prominent header with Half-Life title or logo
Vertical navigation menu on the left side
